summary: Completed testing of Public Quote Page visual parity with PDF feature. The PublicQuotePage now uses the same PDFDocument component from PDFPreview.js, ensuring identical rendering. Backend API returns all required fields (client_phone, client_email, remise_percent, show_line_numbers, option_2/3 remise fields). All 9 backend tests passed.

issues: HTML hydration warnings in console about span/th/tr nesting - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality

frontend_tests.services_table_with_line_numbers: PASS - N°, Description, Qté, Unité, P.U., Total TTC columns
